tree.name: Khaman Maluach
tree.tradeDescription: 7-team trade: PHX sent Kevin Durant to HOU, Alex Toohey to GSW, picks to BKN/MIN; PHX received Jalen Green, Dillon Brooks, Khaman Maluach, Rasheer Fleming, Koby Brea, Daeqwon Plowden, and a 2nd round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Durant
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: PHX sent Mikal Bridges, Cam Johnson to BKN, Jae Crowder to MIL; 2023 1st (#21), 2025 1st (#10), 2027 1st, 2028 1st swap, 2029 1st to BKN; PHX received Kevin Durant and T.J. Warren

assetsGivenUp.name: Mikal Bridges
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: PHX traded Zhaire Smith (#16 pick) and a 2021 1st round pick (MIA own, became Tre Mann) to PHI for Mikal Bridges (#10 pick)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#18) via MIA
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIA traded this future 2021 1st with Danny Granger and a 2017 1st to PHX in 3-team trade for Goran Dragić and Zoran Dragić (Feb 19, 2015). Pick is MIA own.

assetsGivenUp.name: Goran Dragić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as a free agent with the Phoenix Suns (Jul 19, 2012). Traded to MIA (Feb 19, 2015) with Zoran Dragić in 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Zoran Dragić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent by PHX. Traded to MIA (Feb 2015) with Goran Dragić.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cam Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: PHX traded Jarrett Culver (#6 pick) to MIN for Cam Johnson (#11 pick) and Dario Šarić

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#10)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Originally PHX's own 2025 1st. Sent to BKN in KD trade (Feb 9, 2023). BKN traded to HOU (Jun 26, 2024). HOU drafted Maluach #10 (Jun 25, 2025). Returned to PHX in 7-team KD trade (Jul 6, 2025).
assetsGivenUp.note: Full circle — PHX's own pick left for KD, came back with Maluach when KD was traded again.

assetsGivenUp.name: Mikal Bridges
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted #10 by PHI, traded to PHX on draft night for Zhaire Smith (#16) and MIA's 2021 1st (Tre Mann #18). Traded to BKN (Feb 2023) in KD deal.
assetsGivenUp.note: Key asset in KD trade package to BKN.
